assertions.description: pwr_flag_warnings reports that GND has power_in pins but no power_out or PWR_FLAG. However, the schematic contains two PWR_FLAG symbols (#FLG01 and #FLG02), both wired into the GND net.
signal_analysis.transistor_circuits is empty, but Q1 and Q2 are LSK389C dual N-channel JFETs configured as a balanced XLR microphone amplifier.
